privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.lede: Starter privacy text for a parish website. Review and replace this with diocesan-approved wording before launch.
privacy.reviewNotice: This text is a placeholder only. Insert the correct legal parish entity, data-controller wording, and approved diocesan or charity policy before the site goes live.

sections.title: Who we are
sections.body: Replace this section with the full legal name of the parish, its postal address, and the organisation responsible for the website.

sections.title: What information we collect
sections.body: Explain what information is collected through any forms, email links, mailing lists, or safeguarding routes, and why it is needed.

sections.title: How information is used
sections.body: Describe how parish or diocesan staff will use personal information, how long it is kept, and who may have access to it.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.lede: Starter cookie text for a parish website. Review and replace this with the correct wording before launch.
cookies.reviewNotice: If analytics, embedded media, or cookie tools are added, this page must be updated and checked before launch.

sections.title: Essential cookies
sections.body: Explain whether the website uses any essential cookies for navigation, security, or content management.

sections.title: Analytics or embedded content
sections.body: List any analytics tools, embedded livestreams, maps, or third-party media that may set cookies in a visitor's browser.

sections.title: Managing cookies
sections.body: Explain how visitors can change their browser settings or consent choices if cookies are in use.

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.lede: Starter terms of use for a parish website. Review and replace this text with the correct legal wording before launch.
terms.reviewNotice: These terms are placeholders only and should be reviewed with the parish, diocese, or legal adviser before launch.

sections.title: Using the website
sections.body: Explain that the website is intended to provide parish information and that content is offered in good faith.

sections.title: External links
sections.body: Explain that the parish is not responsible for third-party websites linked from this website unless stated otherwise.

sections.title: Accuracy and changes
sections.body: Explain that Mass times, office hours, and public information may change and should be checked with the parish if needed.
